interconnect_attachment.description: Specifies the ID of the interconnect attachment to associate with the router interface. Must belong to the same region as the router.

ip_range.description: Specifies the IP range for the interface, must be a valid CIDR block within the router's network.

ip_version.description: Specifies the IP version for the interface, either IPv4 or IPv6.

name.description: Specifies the name of the router interface, which must be unique within the router and comply with RFC1035 naming conventions.

private_ip_address.description: IP address to assign to the interface; must belong to the subnet's primary IP range.

redundant_interface.description: Specifies the configuration for a redundant interface in the router, including its name, IP address, and associated network or region. Must be paired with another interface for redundancy.

router.description: Specifies the name of the Cloud Router to associate with this interface, must exist in the same region.

subnetwork.description: Specifies the self-link of the subnetwork to which the interface belongs; must be in the same region as the router.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout duration for operations related to the router interface, including create, update, and delete actions.

vpn_tunnel.description: Specifies the VPN tunnel to associate with the router interface; must be a valid VPN tunnel resource in the same region.
